facetListingTexts.amenities_breakfast:
property_description: art deco hotel with free parking, 4-minute walk to comerica center. a restaurant, a 24-hour fitness center, and a bar/lounge are available at this smoke-free hotel. free wifi in public areas, free self parking, and a free area shuttle are also provided. other amenities include a snack bar/deli, coffee/tea in a common area, and a seasonal outdoor pool. . hotel |MASK| frisco by |MASK| offers 110 air-conditioned accommodations with safes and complimentary newspapers. accommodations offer separate sitting areas. premium cable television is provided. bathrooms include showers, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers.

this frisco hotel provides complimentary wireless internet access. business-friendly amenities include desks and phones; free local calls are provided (restrictions may apply). additionally, rooms include complimentary bottled water and coffee/tea makers. housekeeping is provided daily.

. recreational amenities at the hotel include a 24-hour fitness center and a seasonal outdoor pool.

children under 14 years old are not allowed in the swimming pool or fitness facility without adult supervision.

facetListingTexts.pet: pet_policy: 2 total pets; Food and water bowls are available; Pets allowed for an extra charge of USD 50 per pet, per night (maximum USD 75 per stay); Pets cannot be left unattended; Restrictions apply; for more information contact the property at the number on the booking confirmation; Service animals are welcome, and are exempt from fees; Welcoming dogs and cats only
facetListingTexts.children_extra_bed:
children_and_extra_bed_policy:
  • Children are welcome.
  • Kids stay free! Up to 2 children 18 years old and younger stay free when using existing bedding.
  • Rollaway/extra beds are not available.
  • Free cribs (infant beds)!
